label: BSC watch read activity
description: Loads recent BSC Following watch events from storage (populated by the service worker via BscScan). Saves JSON to a row variable: { activity, latest, count }. Optional filters: watched address (0x… or substring) and sinceTimestampMs — turn off **Apply client filters** to save the full list and filter in **rowMath** / **llm** / **runIf** later. Use bscWatchRefresh first if you need a fresh poll. See docs/BSC_AUTOMATION.md.

formSchema.label: Apply address / timestamp filters in this step
Only rows with ts ≥ this (ms, optional)
